fields.label: Reward & Incentive Method
fields.description: How to allocate Reward and Incentive amounts when a Sales Invoice is submitted. Quotation Wise = proportional to invoice value vs quote total. Item Wise = per Quotation Item using qty proportion.

fields.label: Company Account Mapping
fields.description: Liability and expense accounts per company used when posting the Reward / Incentive Journal Entry on Sales Invoice submit.

fields.label: Quotation High-Probability Workflow
fields.description: Roles that drive the High-Probability Quotation lock, the Document Approval flow (Request for Update / Cancellation Check), and the Restricted-Roles RBAC.

fields.label: Quote Approval Role (legacy)
fields.description: Legacy single approver — kept for back-compat. Use the Approval Roles table below to assign multiple roles.

fields.label: Level 1 Approval Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles can perform LEVEL 1 approvals on submitted high-probability quotes — first stage of the L1→L2 approval chain (Approve Level 1 / Reject / Approve Cancellation Level 1). OR-logic. If empty, the legacy single role above is used.

fields.label: Level 2 Approval Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles can perform LEVEL 2 approvals — second stage of the L1→L2 chain (Approve Level 2 / Approve Cancellation Level 2). OR-logic. If empty, the L1 approver pool is reused for L2 (single-stage fallback).

fields.label: Probability Approver Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles can approve or reject a Pending Probability Change request on a submitted Quotation (per Probability BRD: downgrade from ≥75% to <75% requires management approval). OR-logic. If empty, falls back to Level 2 Approval Roles.

fields.label: Quotation Team Role (legacy)
fields.description: Legacy single team role — kept for back-compat. Use the Team Roles table below to assign multiple roles.

fields.label: Team Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles can own Quotations and submit Document Approval requests. Members are also auto-whitelisted for the High-Probability lock. OR-logic. If empty, the legacy single role above is used.

fields.label: Restricted Roles (Read-only on Approved+100)
fields.description: Roles whose users see only Quotations where workflow_state='Approved' AND probability=100. Typically downstream teams: Dispatch, Procurement, Supply Chain, Logistics.

fields.label: Signature Images for Print Formats
fields.description: Upload signature PNGs that render dynamically on Payment Voucher print formats. The 'Signature Slot' on each row is what the print template looks up — use a workflow role label ('Approved Level 1', 'Approved Level 2', 'Authorised', 'Released') for dynamic signers, or a free-form name ('Siby Joy', 'Siby Thomas John') for static signers.

fields.label: Payment Request Form
fields.description: Avientek-specific behaviour overrides for Payment Request Form.

fields.label: Issued Bank Edit Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles can edit the Issued Bank (and Payment Mode) on a Payment Request Form in ANY pre-Released state — Draft, Authorised, Pending L1, Approved L1, Pending L2, Approved L2. Once the PRF transitions to Released the field locks for everyone. The workflow allow_edit rows are regenerated for these roles every time the after_migrate workflow seeder runs, so add a role and run `bench migrate` to apply. Defaults to Finance Controller + System Manager when empty.

fields.label: PRF Revise Roles
fields.description: Any user with ANY of these roles sees the 'Revise' workflow action on a PRF in 'Authorised' state — clicking it routes the document back to 'Draft' for corrections (instead of forcing a Reject). User is prompted for a mandatory reason; creator gets notified. Defaults to Finance Manager + General Manager + Director when empty.

fields.label: Notifications
fields.description: Master switch for Avientek-generated transactional emails (Quotation approval requests, approved / rejected confirmations, prob-100 alerts). Uses the default outgoing Email Account configured under Email Domain → Email Account.

fields.label: Enable Quotation Email Notifications
fields.description: When OFF, no Avientek-generated quotation emails are sent. ToDo creation continues regardless. Useful during testing or when the outgoing mailbox is rate-limited.

fields.label: Enable Workflow-State Notifications
fields.description: Phase 2 opt-in. When ON, transitions to Pending For Approval / Pending L2 Approval / Approved / Rejected create ToDos for the relevant users and send templated emails (routed by Sales Person → User Permission match per BRD). ToDos are created regardless of the master email switch.

fields.label: Enable Probability Change Emails
fields.description: When ON, sending a Probability Change Request triggers an email to all configured Probability Approvers, and Approve / Reject decisions email the original requester. When OFF, ToDos are still created but no emails are sent. Independent of the other notification switches above.

fields.label: Restrict to Workflow Participants
fields.description: When ON, quotation emails (incl. the 100%-probability alert) only go to users who took part in the document's workflow — the creator, configured sales persons on the quote, and anyone who acted on a Workflow Action for it. When OFF, the broader role-based recipient list is used (everyone with the approver role).
